name: United Pharma
message: United Pharma LLC is a softgel contract manufacturer based in Southern California, specializing in high-quality nutraceuticals and supplements. Founded in 2006, the company boasts a state-of-the-art 55,000 square foot facility and adheres to strict quality standards in its production processes. Their services include gelatin mixing, encapsulation, bottling, and custom labeling, catering to clients seeking innovative softgel solutions. With a highly experienced management team, United Pharma aims to be a progressive partner for both its customers and the community.
